holdings.infoBox: KNGZ is an equity ETF with a total of 101 individual holdings. The top holdings are QUALCOMM stock at 4.86%, Hewlett Packard Enterprise Company at 4.41%, HP Inc. at 4.33%, Texas Instruments at 4.25%, and Microchip Technology at 3.77%.

overview.description: The First Trust S&P 500 Diversified Dividend Aristocrats ETF (KNGZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund tracks a sector-neutral US large-cap index selected and weighted based on dividend history and yield. KNGZ was launched on Jun 20, 2017 and is issued by First Trust.
